ddls:
CREATE TABLE "agents" (
  "agent_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each agent */,
  "agent_name" TEXT /* Full name of the agent */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the agent */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the agent */,
  "team" TEXT /* Team that the agent belongs to */,
  "experience_years" INTEGER /* Number of years of experience of the agent */,
  "specialization" TEXT /* Area of specialization (e.g., residential, commercial) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("agent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "clients" (
  "client_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each client */,
  "client_name" TEXT /* Full name of the client */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the client */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the client */,
  "preferences" TEXT /* Preferences or requirements of the client regarding properties */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("client_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property involved in the transaction */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* ID of the client making the purchase */,
  "agent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the agent handling the transaction */,
  "transaction_date" TEXT /* Date of the transaction */,
  "transaction_amount" REAL /* Amount of the transaction */,
  "transaction_type" TEXT /* Type of transaction (e.g., 'sale', 'rental') */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_client_id FOREIGN KEY ("client_id") REFERENCES clients ("client_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_agent_id FOREIGN KEY ("agent_id") REFERENCES agents ("agent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "amenities" (
  "amenity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each amenity */,
  "amenity_name" TEXT /* Name of the amenity (e.g., Park, MRT Station) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the amenity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("amenity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "property_images" (
  "image_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each image */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property associated with the image */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the image */,
  "uploaded_date" TEXT /* Date when the image was uploaded */,
  "image_description" TEXT /* Description of the image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("image_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_trends" (
  "trend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trend record */,
  "trend_date" TEXT /* Date of the recorded trend */,
  "average_price" REAL /* Average selling price in the market */,
  "average_area_sqm" REAL /* Average area of properties sold in square meters */,
  "number_of_sales" INTEGER /* Number of properties sold */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trend_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., admin, agent, client) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_accounts" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user account */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user (hashed) */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role assigned to the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_accounts_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "preferences" (
  "preference_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each preference record */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* ID of the client associated with the preference */,
  "property_type" TEXT /* Type of property the client prefers */,
  "max_price" REAL /* Maximum price the client is willing to pay */,
  "min_area" REAL /* Minimum area of property the client prefers */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("preference_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_preferences_client_id FOREIGN KEY ("client_id") REFERENCES clients ("client_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "property_amenities" (
  "property_amenity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each property-amenity association */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property */,
  "amenity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the amenity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("property_amenity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_property_amenities_amenity_id FOREIGN KEY ("amenity_id") REFERENCES amenities ("amenity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_interactions" (
  "interaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each interaction */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who interacted with the property */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property interacted with */,
  "interaction_date" TEXT /* Date when the interaction occurred */,
  "interaction_type" TEXT /* Type of interaction (e.g., 'view', 'favorite', 'contact_agent') */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("interaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_interactions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES user_accounts ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "property_reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property reviewed */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* ID of the client who wrote the review */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date when the review was written */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating given by the client (e.g., 1-5 stars) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_property_reviews_client_id FOREIGN KEY ("client_id") REFERENCES clients ("client_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property associated with the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "report_text" TEXT /* Text of the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id")
)
